articles.original_title: Colfax County's May 12 unofficial primary election results

A2.title: Election Results
A2.body: There was an election in Colfax County. It was on May 12. The results are not final. Ricketts, Flood, and Pillen are ahead. They are in the lead. The election was for the primary. The results are unofficial. People voted on May 12. The county is waiting for the final results. The election is important. The winners will be known soon. The people voted for their choice. The results will be final soon.

B1.title: Primary Election Results
B1.body: On May 12, Colfax County had a primary election. The unofficial results are out. Ricketts, Flood, and Pillen are ahead in the election. They got more votes than others. The election was important for the county. People voted to choose their leaders. The results are not final yet. They will be confirmed later. The candidates are happy with the results so far. They worked hard for the election. Now, they are waiting for the final results. The people of Colfax County are also waiting. They want to know who their new leaders will be. The election was a big event for the county.

B2.title: Primary Election Results Unveiled
B2.body: The unofficial results of Colfax County's primary election, held on May 12, have been announced. According to the early reports, Ricketts, Flood, and Pillen are leading the pack. These initial results provide valuable insights into the voting trends in the county. The primary election is a crucial step in the democratic process, allowing voters to choose their preferred candidates. The outcome of this election will likely have a significant impact on the upcoming general election. As the results are unofficial, they are subject to change. However, the current standings suggest that Ricketts, Flood, and Pillen have gained considerable support from the voters. The election has garnered attention from the local community, with many residents eagerly awaiting the final results. The candidates' campaigns and policies have been under scrutiny, and the voters have made their voices heard. The election process is a testament to the county's democratic values.

C1.title: Primary Election Results Unveiled
C1.body: In the recently conducted primary election in Colfax County, held on May 12, preliminary unofficial results have emerged, indicating that Ricketts, Flood, and Pillen are poised to take the lead. These early findings provide a glimpse into the electoral inclinations of the county's constituents, with the aforementioned candidates garnering a significant amount of support. As the election process unfolds, these results will undoubtedly be subject to scrutiny and verification. The primary election, a pivotal event in the democratic process, enables citizens to exercise their right to vote and shape the future of their local governance. The involvement of Ricketts, Flood, and Pillen in the election has been a focal point of interest, with each candidate presenting their unique vision for the county's development. The outcome of this election will have far-reaching implications, influencing the trajectory of Colfax County's political landscape. With the election having taken place on May 12, the community now awaits the official results, which will ultimately determine the fate of the candidates and the future of the county. The preliminary results have sparked intense discussion and speculation, underscoring the significance of this electoral event.

articles.original_title: SWS: Hunger among Filipino families rises to 23.2% in March 2026

A2.title: Hunger Rises in Philippines
A2.body: Many Filipino families are hungry. The rate is 23.2 percent. This is from a survey in March 2026. The survey asked 1,500 adults. They talked face-to-face. The rate was 20.1 percent in November 2025. Now it is higher. Hunger means no food to eat. This is the highest rate in a long time. It happened in the Philippines. Many people are affected. The survey shows a big increase. Hunger is a big problem. It is getting worse.

B1.title: Hunger Rises in Philippines
B1.body: More Filipino families experienced hunger in the first quarter of 2026. The national rate rose to 23.2 percent, according to a Social Weather Stations survey. The survey was conducted from March 24 to 31 with 1,500 adults nationwide. It showed an increase of 3.1 percentage points from November 2025. Involuntary hunger means being hungry and having nothing to eat at least once in the past three months. This is the highest hunger rate since March. The survey is important because it shows the situation of many families in the Philippines. Hunger is a big problem and it affects many people.

B2.title: Hunger Rises in Philippines
B2.body: A recent survey by Social Weather Stations (SWS) found that 23.2% of Filipino families experienced hunger in March 2026. This is a 3.1% increase from November 2025. The survey, which involved face-to-face interviews with 1,500 adults nationwide, showed that more families had nothing to eat at least once in the past three months. This is the highest hunger rate since March of the previous year. The SWS defines involuntary hunger as having no food to eat at least once in the past three months. The rise in hunger rates is a significant concern for the country. The survey was conducted from March 24 to 31, 2026. The results highlight the need to address food insecurity in the Philippines. Hunger affects many families, and it is essential to find solutions to this problem. The SWS survey provides valuable insights into the issue.

C1.title: Filipino Families Face Rising Hunger
C1.body: A recent survey conducted by the Social Weather Stations (SWS) has revealed a notable escalation in the prevalence of hunger among Filipino families, with the national rate surging to 23.2 percent in March 2026. This uptick marks a 3.1 percentage point increase from the 20.1 percent recorded in November 2025. The survey, which involved face-to-face interviews with 1,500 adults nationwide from March 24 to 31, underscores the pervasive issue of involuntary hunger, defined as experiencing hunger and having nothing to eat at least once in the past three months. This phenomenon is particularly pertinent in the context of the country's socioeconomic landscape, where the confluence of factors such as poverty, unemployment, and limited access to resources exacerbates the problem of food insecurity. The SWS survey highlights the need for concerted efforts to address this pressing concern, which has significant implications for the well-being and quality of life of affected individuals and communities. The rising hunger rate is a stark reminder of the challenges that lie ahead, necessitating a comprehensive and multifaceted approach to mitigate its effects.

articles.original_title: AI is already in classrooms, SA must govern it now

A2.title: AI in Classrooms
A2.body: A minister is warning people. AI is in classrooms now. It can help with work. But teachers must decide. AI can write, but teachers must think. This is important for schools. The minister wants rules. AI is new and exciting. But we must be careful. AI can help teachers. Teachers must protect thinking. This is important for students. The minister wants to help.

B1.title: AI in Classrooms Now
B1.body: A minister warns schools about using AI. AI can help with work, but teachers must decide what is best. This is to protect thinking and human judgment. The minister says we should not be too excited or too worried about AI. It is already in some classrooms. Teachers must use AI carefully. The minister wants rules to help schools use AI well. This will help students learn and think for themselves. AI can do some tasks, but teachers are important. They must make sure AI does not replace human judgment and thinking. This is a big issue in education now.

B2.title: AI in Classrooms
B2.body: A minister has warned against blindly embracing or panicking about Artificial Intelligence in schools. AI can assist with drafting, but teachers must make the final decisions to protect critical thinking and human judgment. This is crucial in maintaining the quality of education. The minister's warning comes as AI is increasingly being used in classrooms. It is essential to govern its use to ensure it benefits students. The minister emphasized the need for a balanced approach, avoiding both over-enthusiasm and excessive caution. By doing so, educators can harness the potential of AI while preserving the essence of human teaching. This balanced approach will enable students to develop their skills effectively, preparing them for the future. Effective governance of AI in schools is vital to achieve this goal, and it requires careful consideration and planning.

C1.title: AI in Classrooms Demands Governance
C1.body: The burgeoning presence of Artificial Intelligence in educational institutions has prompted a ministerial warning against adopting a cavalier attitude, wherein blind enthusiasm or unwarranted panic could potentially undermine the pedagogical benefits of this technology. It is imperative that educators and policymakers strike a judicious balance, recognizing that while AI can facilitate the drafting of certain materials, the ultimate decision-making process must remain the prerogative of teachers, thereby safeguarding the development of critical thinking and human judgment. This nuanced approach will enable the effective harnessing of AI's capabilities, ensuring that the technology complements rather than supplants the role of educators. By doing so, the intrinsic value of human interaction and discernment can be preserved, even as the educational sector continues to evolve in tandem with technological advancements. The minister's admonition serves as a timely reminder of the need for prudent governance and oversight in this context, particularly in locales such as South Africa, where the judicious integration of AI in classrooms could have far-reaching implications for the country's educational landscape.

articles.original_title: Noida International Airport to levy passenger user fee from mid-June; AERA sets UDF rates

A2.title: New Airport Fees
A2.body: A new airport is opening in Noida. It will start in June. The airport will charge people to use it. This is called a user fee. The fee is set by AERA. AERA decides how much to charge. The airport will open in mid-June. People will pay to use the airport. The fee is new. It will start soon. The airport is ready to open. AERA set the fee rates. The rates are new. The airport will charge people to use it from June.

B1.title: New Airport Fee Starts Soon
B1.body: The Noida International Airport will open in mid-June. Before it opens, a new fee for passengers was set. This fee is called the User Development Fee. The group that decides airport fees, AERA, made this decision. The new fee will be added to the cost of tickets. This change is important because it will help the airport pay for its services. The airport is getting ready to start operations. The new fee will start in mid-June when the airport opens. This will be a new cost for people who use the airport. The fee is now set and will be added soon.

B2.title: Noida Airport Introduces User Fee
B2.body: The Airports Economic Regulatory Authority (AERA) has fixed the passenger user fee for the Noida International Airport, which is set to launch in mid-June. This move sets the stage for the airport's operations with new charges in place. As a result, passengers will have to pay an additional fee when using the airport's facilities. The introduction of the user fee is a significant development ahead of the airport's launch. The new charges will apply to all passengers, and the fees will be used to maintain and improve the airport's infrastructure. The Noida International Airport is expected to become a major hub for air travel in the region, and the user fee is a crucial step in its development. With the launch date approaching, passengers can expect a smooth and efficient travel experience. The airport's operations will be closely monitored to ensure that the new fees do not negatively impact passengers.

C1.title: Noida Airport Introduces User Fee
C1.body: The Airports Economic Regulatory Authority (AERA) has established a passenger user fee for the forthcoming Noida International Airport, slated to commence operations in mid-June. This development heralds the imposition of novel charges, thereby setting the tone for the airport's inaugural phase. Notably, the introduction of this fee is a pivotal aspect of the airport's operational framework, as it will ostensibly generate revenue to offset expenditures incurred during the construction and maintenance of the facility. The implementation of the user fee is contingent upon the airport's launch, which is eagerly anticipated by stakeholders and passengers alike. As the airport prepares to welcome its first passengers, the AERA's decision is likely to have far-reaching implications for the aviation sector, particularly with regard to the financial viability of the airport. The user fee, although potentially burdensome for some travelers, is expected to contribute significantly to the airport's overall revenue stream, thereby ensuring its sustainability in the long term. The airport's proximity to major urban centers and its state-of-the-art infrastructure are likely to make it an attractive option for passengers, despite the additional fee.

articles.original_title: New Housing Data Paints a Troubling Picture

A2.title: Housing Market Has Problems
A2.body: The housing market is not doing well. New numbers are out for April. The number of new homes for sale is up 2.1%. Home sales are down. This is not good news. The spring season is not going well. People are worried. The housing market is important. It affects many people. New homes are not selling. This is a problem. The market is slow. It is not growing. People want to buy homes. But it is not easy.

B1.title: Housing Market Shows Signs
B1.body: The housing market is not doing well. New numbers for April show that the number of new homes for sale is up 2.1% from last year. However, home sales are down. This is a problem for the spring season. A new report from Zillow has these numbers. The housing market is important because it affects many people. Home sales and new listings are key to a strong market. The numbers for April are not good. The market is barely moving. This is a concern for the future. The report from Zillow gives a clear picture of the market. It is not a good sign for home buyers and sellers.

B2.title: Housing Market Shows Signs of Struggle
B2.body: The housing market is experiencing a slowdown, with the latest data from Zillow showing a mixed picture for the spring season. In April, the number of new listings increased by 2.1% compared to the same period last year. However, home sales have declined, indicating a potential downturn in the market. This trend is likely to continue, making it a challenging time for buyers and sellers alike. The report highlights the need for careful monitoring of the market, as the situation is not shaping up well so far. With the spring season typically being a busy period for the housing market, the current trends are a cause for concern. The data suggests that the market is struggling to gain momentum, and it remains to be seen how the rest of the year will unfold. The latest numbers are a troubling sign for the industry, and experts are watching closely to see what the future holds.

C1.title: Housing Market Trends Raise Concerns
C1.body: The latest data from the housing market presents a precarious scenario, as the traditionally vibrant spring season is faltering. According to a recent research report by Zillow, the month of April witnessed a modest 2.1% increase in new listings compared to the preceding year. Conversely, home sales have experienced a decline, underscoring the market's struggles to regain momentum. This dichotomy has significant implications, as it may presage a protracted period of stagnation. The ramifications of this trend are far-reaching, affecting not only prospective homeowners but also the broader economy. As the market continues to navigate these challenges, it remains to be seen whether the forthcoming months will bring about a resurgence or perpetuate the current malaise. The interplay between supply and demand will be crucial in determining the trajectory of the housing market, and industry experts are closely monitoring the situation. With the spring season typically being a pivotal period for the market, the current trends are being scrutinized intensely, and the upcoming months will be pivotal in shaping the market's future.

articles.original_title: Himachal Education Board Begins Groundwork to Introduce AI Education in Schools

A2.title: AI Education in Schools
A2.body: The Himachal Pradesh Board of School Education is starting a new project. They want to teach Artificial Intelligence in schools. The project will start in Class VI. The board wants students to learn new technologies. They will start soon. The project is important for students. It will help them in the future. The board is working hard. They want to make it successful. The project will be in all schools. It will start this year. The board is happy to start it.

B1.title: AI Education Starts
B1.body: The Himachal Pradesh Board of School Education is starting a new project. They want to introduce Artificial Intelligence education in schools. The project will begin in Class VI. The goal is to teach students about new technologies from a young age. This will help them in the future. The Board is working on the plan now. They want to make sure it is a success. The project is important for the students' future. It will help them learn new skills. The Board is taking the first steps. They are exploring how to make it work. The project will start soon.

B2.title: AI Education in Himachal Schools
B2.body: The Himachal Pradesh Board of School Education has begun preparing to introduce Artificial Intelligence-based education in schools across the state. The Board is examining the feasibility of launching AI education from Class VI, aiming to equip students with foundational knowledge of emerging technologies at an early stage. This initiative is significant as it will enable students to gain a deeper understanding of AI and its applications. By introducing AI education, the Board seeks to enhance the curriculum and provide students with skills that are in high demand. The move is expected to benefit students in the long run, making them more competitive in the job market. The Board's decision is a step towards embracing technology and preparing students for the future. This initiative will likely have a positive impact on the education system in Himachal Pradesh, making it more modern and relevant.

C1.title: AI Education Initiative Launched
C1.body: The Himachal Pradesh Board of School Education has embarked on an ambitious endeavour to introduce Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based education in schools across the state, with the primary objective of equipping students with a foundational understanding of emerging technologies from an early stage. By commencing this initiative, the Board aims to foster a culture of innovation and technological adeptness amongst its students, thereby enhancing their prospects in an increasingly complex and interconnected world. The proposed introduction of AI education, slated to commence from Class VI, underscores the Board's commitment to providing its students with a comprehensive and forward-thinking education. This pioneering initiative is poised to have a profound impact on the state's education sector, as it seeks to bridge the gap between traditional pedagogy and modern technological advancements. The Board's proactive approach to integrating AI-based education is a testament to its dedication to providing students with the skills and knowledge requisite to thrive in a rapidly evolving technological landscape, ultimately contributing to the state's socio-economic development and growth. The initiative is expected to have far-reaching consequences, shaping the future of education in the state and beyond.

articles.original_title: Parkinson reflects on Wrexham's historic campaign and says 'We've got to be proud'

A2.title: Wrexham's Historic Season
A2.body: Wrexham had a good season. They played well. Phil Parkinson is proud. He is the team manager. Wrexham did not get a play-off spot. They are disappointed. The season is over. Parkinson says they must be proud. Wrexham worked hard. They had a historic campaign. The team is happy. They did their best. Wrexham is a good team.

B1.title: Wrexham's Historic Season
B1.body: Wrexham's Championship season has ended. Phil Parkinson is proud of his team's achievements. They did not get a play-off spot, which is disappointing. The team worked hard and did well. Parkinson thinks they should be proud of what they did. The season was historic for Wrexham. They achieved a lot and learned from their experiences. The team will try to do better next season. Parkinson is already looking forward to the next challenge. He wants his team to improve and succeed. Wrexham's fans are also proud of their team. They supported them throughout the season and will continue to do so.

B2.title: Wrexham's Historic Season
B2.body: The dust has settled on Wrexham's Championship season, and manager Phil Parkinson is reflecting on the team's achievements. Although they missed out on a play-off spot, Parkinson is proud of what his side accomplished. The season was historic for Wrexham, and Parkinson believes the team should be proud of their efforts. Despite the disappointment, the team's performance was commendable, and they gave it their all. The season may not have ended as they had hoped, but Parkinson is already looking to the future. He is eager to build on the team's progress and make improvements for the next season. The team's determination and perseverance were evident throughout the season, and Parkinson is confident that they will bounce back stronger. The experience gained will be invaluable, and the team will learn from their mistakes. Overall, Wrexham's season was a notable one, and Parkinson is proud to have been a part of it.

C1.title: Wrexham's Historic Campaign
C1.body: As the dust settles on Wrexham's captivating Championship season, manager Phil Parkinson reflects on the campaign with a profound sense of pride, albeit tempered by the lingering disappointment of narrowly missing out on a coveted play-off spot. Despite this, Parkinson's side has garnered widespread acclaim for their remarkable achievements, which have undoubtedly left an indelible mark on the club's history. The team's unwavering dedication and unrelenting passion have been palpable throughout the season, as they navigated a myriad of challenges with fortitude and resilience. While the ultimate goal of securing a play-off spot proved elusive, the season's accomplishments serve as a testament to the team's unyielding spirit and their ability to transcend adversity. As Parkinson and his team embark on a period of introspection, they can derive solace from the knowledge that their historic campaign has instilled a renewed sense of optimism and enthusiasm among the club's faithful supporters. The campaign's legacy will undoubtedly continue to resonate, serving as a catalyst for future success. With the season's conclusion, Parkinson's pride is palpable, and his team's accomplishments will be etched in the memories of the club's aficionados for years to come.

articles.original_title: SB19 gets hour-long set in Chicago's Lollapalooza fest

A2.title: SB19 Performs in Chicago
A2.body: SB19 is a Filipino group. They will perform in Chicago. The event is Lollapalooza. It is a big music festival. SB19 will sing for one hour. They are the first Filipino act to perform. This is a big deal for them. They will perform in front of many people. The event is in Chicago. It is a big city. SB19 is very happy. They will perform for one hour in Chicago.

B1.title: SB19 Performs at Lollapalooza
B1.body: SB19 will perform at Lollapalooza in Chicago. They are the first Filipino act to do this. The group will have a one-hour set. This is a big deal for Filipino music. SB19 is very popular in the Philippines. Now, they will play in front of a new audience. Lollapalooza is a famous music festival. It happens every year in Chicago. Many people attend this event. SB19's performance is important for Filipino music fans. It shows that Filipino music can be popular around the world. The event will be a great experience for SB19 and their fans. They will enjoy the music and the festival.

B2.title: SB19 Performs at Lollapalooza
B2.body: Filipino boy band SB19 is making history as the first homegrown act to perform at the prestigious Lollapalooza festival in Chicago. The group will take the stage for an hour-long set, a significant milestone for the band. This opportunity is a testament to their hard work and dedication to their craft. Lollapalooza is a major music festival that attracts thousands of attendees from around the world. By performing at this event, SB19 will be able to showcase their talent to a diverse audience, potentially gaining new fans and expanding their global reach. The festival is a platform for artists to gain exposure and recognition, and SB19's participation is a significant achievement for the Philippine music industry. This performance will undoubtedly be a memorable experience for the band and their fans, and it may lead to more opportunities for them in the future. The event is a chance for SB19 to prove themselves as a talented and entertaining act, and their hour-long set will be a thrilling experience for the audience.

C1.title: Filipino Group Debuts at Lollapalooza
C1.body: In a groundbreaking feat, SB19, a Filipino sensation, is poised to make history as the inaugural homegrown act to perform at the prestigious Lollapalooza festival in Chicago. This milestone marks a significant breakthrough for the group, as they will be allotted a substantial hour-long set, affording them ample opportunity to mesmerize the audience with their unique blend of talent and charisma. The festival, renowned for its eclectic lineup and electric atmosphere, will provide an ideal platform for SB19 to showcase their distinctive sound, thereby introducing their brand of music to a diverse and discerning crowd. As the first Filipino act to participate in this esteemed event, SB19's performance is anticipated to be a watershed moment, paving the way for future generations of Filipino artists to gain international recognition. The group's impending appearance at Lollapalooza is a testament to their perseverance and dedication to their craft, and their scheduled performance is expected to be a tour de force, leaving an indelible mark on the festival's attendees. This momentous occasion will undoubtedly be a defining moment in the group's career, and a source of pride for their fans.

articles.original_title: Gab Pangilinan shines as sole Filipino in international cast of ‘Jesus Christ Superstar’

A2.title: Filipina Star Shines
A2.body: Gab Pangilinan is a Filipina actress. She is in a musical. The musical is 'Jesus Christ Superstar'. She is with other actors. They are from other countries. Luke Street and Javon King are in the show. Gab is the only Filipino. She is very good. The musical is fun. Many people like it. Gab is happy. She likes her role. The show is big. It has many actors.

B1.title: Filipina Star Shines
B1.body: Gab Pangilinan is the only Filipino artist in the musical 'Jesus Christ Superstar'. She performs with international actors Luke Street and Javon King. The show is a big production with many foreign performers. Gab takes center stage and does a great job. This is a big opportunity for her to show her talent. The musical is very popular and many people want to see it. Gab's role is important and she is happy to be a part of it. She is proud to represent the Philippines in the international cast. The show is a great chance for her to learn from other actors. It is also a big chance for her to show what she can do. She is doing a great job and people are enjoying the show.

B2.title: Filipina Shines in Jesus Christ Superstar
B2.body: Gab Pangilinan, a talented Filipina theater actress, has taken the spotlight as the sole Filipino artist in the international cast of the iconic musical 'Jesus Christ Superstar'. She shares the stage with foreign performers Luke Street and Javon King, bringing a unique blend of local and global talent to the production. This significant role showcases Pangilinan's impressive skills and versatility as a performer. The musical, a timeless classic, continues to captivate audiences worldwide with its thought-provoking themes and memorable soundtrack. Pangilinan's participation in the international cast highlights the growing presence of Filipino artists in global theater productions. Her involvement is a testament to the country's thriving arts scene and its ability to produce talented performers who can compete on the international stage. This production is a must-see for fans of the musical and those interested in witnessing the best of local and international talent come together.

C1.title: Filipina Actress Shines Internationally
C1.body: Notably, Filipina theater actress Gab Pangilinan has assumed a pivotal role as the sole Filipino artist in the international cast of the iconic musical 'Jesus Christ Superstar'. This esteemed production boasts a diverse ensemble of talented performers, including Luke Street and Javon King, who have converged to bring this revered rock opera to life. By virtue of her participation, Pangilinan has effectively bridged the cultural divide, exemplifying the transcendent power of theater to unite individuals from disparate backgrounds. The inclusion of a Filipino artist in this global production underscores the increasing recognition of the Philippines' thriving arts scene, thereby fostering a sense of national pride. Furthermore, this collaboration serves as a testament to the universal language of music, which continues to inspire and captivate audiences worldwide. The musical's themes of faith, redemption, and self-discovery are skillfully woven throughout the narrative, rendering it a poignant and thought-provoking experience. As the curtains draw open, the audience is transported to a world of profound emotion and introspection, precipitating a nuanced exploration of the human condition.
